rxLabConflicts.name: Kidney Risk (Metformin)
rxLabConflicts.message: Metformin use with elevated creatinine increases risk of lactic acidosis.
rxLabConflicts.action: Consult nephrologist; consider dose reduction or alternative.

rxLabConflicts.name: Kidney Risk (NSAIDs)
rxLabConflicts.message: NSAIDs can further impair kidney function in patients with high creatinine.
rxLabConflicts.action: Avoid NSAIDs; use Paracetamol for pain if appropriate.

rxLabConflicts.name: Liver Risk (Statins)
rxLabConflicts.message: Statins can elevate liver enzymes. Monitoring required.
rxLabConflicts.action: Repeat LFTs in 2-4 weeks; monitor for jaundice or upper abdominal pain.

rxLabConflicts.name: Liver Risk (Paracetamol)
rxLabConflicts.message: High dose Paracetamol is contraindicated in acute liver injury.
rxLabConflicts.action: Limit Paracetamol to <2g/day or avoid entirely.

rxLabConflicts.name: Hyperkalemia Risk (ACEi)
rxLabConflicts.message: ACE inhibitors and ARBs can further increase potassium levels.
rxLabConflicts.action: Monitor potassium closely; consider low-potassium diet.

rxLabConflicts.name: Hyperkalemia Risk (Spironolactone)
rxLabConflicts.message: Potassium-sparing diuretics pose severe hyperkalemia risk with high baseline K+.

rxLabConflicts.name: Hypoglycemia Risk
rxLabConflicts.message: Intensive insulin therapy with low HbA1c increases severe hypoglycemia risk.
rxLabConflicts.action: Review insulin dosage and monitoring frequency.

rxLabConflicts.name: Thyroid Optimization
rxLabConflicts.message: Elevated TSH suggests Levothyroxine dose may be sub-therapeutic.

ayurvedicConflicts.name: Ashwagandha + Thyroid
ayurvedicConflicts.message: Ashwagandha may increase thyroid hormone levels, potentially causing hyperthyroidism.

ayurvedicConflicts.name: Ashwagandha + Sedatives
ayurvedicConflicts.message: Ashwagandha has sedative properties and may enhance effects of prescription sedatives.

ayurvedicConflicts.name: Triphala + Blood Thinners
ayurvedicConflicts.message: Triphala may have mild anti-platelet effects, increasing bleeding risk with anticoagulants.
ayurvedicConflicts.action: Monitor for unusual bruising or bleeding.

ayurvedicConflicts.name: Turmeric + Blood Thinners
ayurvedicConflicts.message: Curcumin in turmeric has anticoagulant properties.
ayurvedicConflicts.action: Avoid high-dose curcumin supplements while on blood thinners.

trendRules.message: Significant rise in WBC detected. Possible acute infection.
Rising creatinine trend suggests declining renal function.
Declining hemoglobin levels. Monitor for anemia or occult bleeding.
